blockers: Depends on robustness/leakage worker before integration merge.
notes: Rule candidates are shadow-only and are not wired into packaged execution.
Gold API is used only for offline top-k hit delta measurement.
Candidate rule definitions use non-gold reusable vocabulary/path-shape triggers only.
